experience.organization: Orbrick Consulting Pvt. Ltd., Ahmedabad, India
experience.description: Providing solutions for deploying Machine Learning in employment management systems for higher education institutions.

Presiding Chair for the M. Tech. Geomatics program, focusing on curriculum development, outreach, and research and academic collaborations with other organizations.
Teaching subjects including Geospatial Programming, GIS for Smart Cities, Applications of Spatial Big Data and Analytics, Geospatial Modelling and Applications, and Python for Statistics.
Managing other institutional responsibilities for Faculty of Technology, including Admissions Committee Coordinator and Computer Lab Coordinator.
Teaching subjects including Surveying, GIS, and Remote Sensing to students of B.E. (Civil Engineering) and providing guidance to students for minor projects and final thesis.

Conducting primary research and developing computational models in the fields of Applied Meteorology, Thermal and Multispectral Remote Sensing, and Machine Learning at the Space Applications Centre (SAC), Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO), Ahmedabad.
Teaching subjects including Spatial Analysis and Statistics, Natural Resource Management, and GIS Lab to students of M.Sc. (Geoinformatics).
Conducting primary research under the project 'Quantization of Aerosol Radiative Forcing over an Urban Environment' at the Department of Physics and Electronics at St. Xavier's College.
